name: pi-dteam
description_en: dteam - goal-driven self-growing multi-worker collaboration extension for Pi (summon pool / collective intelligence); synchronous foreground Orchestrator Loop with fixed five roles and mandatory check gate
description_zh: dteam - Pi 的目标驱动自增长多worker协作扩展（召唤池 / 集体智能）；同步前台编排器循环，具有固定五个角色和强制检查门
